description: Phase 25 scan_dir_inventory: reports/n6_dir_inventory.json must exist with status=GREEN AND reports/n6_coverage_map.json.unobserved_count must be 0. Pair-closes P24's open finding — P24 flagged theory/bridge/calc as name-unreferenced, and P25 references all three by doing a minimal inventory (file count, total bytes, newest mtime), driving unobserved_count to zero. A future drift (sudden file-count delta, mtime jump) will at least be visible in the inventory report.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_dir_inventory.json ] || { echo 0; exit 0; }; s=$(jq -r .status reports/n6_dir_inventory.json 2>/dev/null); u=$(jq -r ".unobserved_count" reports/n6_coverage_map.json 2>/dev/null); [ "$s" = "GREEN" ] && [ "$u" = "0" ] && echo 1 || echo 0'
